entities.name: Warm Intro Generator
entities.context: Automated tool that scans meeting folders and generates warm introduction emails when V promised to connect two parties

entities.name: Vrijen
entities.context: V, the user who makes commitments during meetings to introduce participants to third parties

entities.name: Double Opt-In
entities.context: Introduction email style that asks permission before making the intro - 'Want an intro?'

entities.name: MG-4
entities.context: Stage designation in a maturity/generation framework for tools (mg_stage)

relationships.context: V uses this tool to fulfill networking commitments made during meetings
Tool generates Double Opt-In style emails as one of its output formats
Tool is classified at MG-4 stage with canonical status
